title: Midnight-Creamy Brazilian Doenjang Gratin
description: A rich, creamy, and malty Brazilian-inspired gratin featuring doenjang, perfect for a midnight snack. This plant-based-friendly dish is a twist on traditional Korean doenjang jjigae.

ingredients.name: Plant-based milk
ingredients.notes: such as soy milk or almond milk

instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the doenjang, plant-based milk, flour, and a pinch of salt. Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture thickens, about 5 minutes.
Add the unsalted vegan butter, onion, and garlic to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the robata-grilled mushrooms and nutritional yeast (if using). Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the saucepan to the preheated raclette grill and cook, uncovered, until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly, about 10-12 minutes.
Remove the gratin from the raclette grill and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
